headline: Humana (HUM) Valuation Check After Prolonged Share Price Weakness And Regulatory Concerns
summary: Recent performance snapshot Humana (HUM) has been under pressure recently, with the share price showing a 0.3% decline over the past day, a 4.7% decline over the past week and a 7.9% drop over the past month. Those shorter term moves sit alongside a 28.7% decline over the past 3 months, a 32.5% year to date decline and a 28.0% decline in the 1 year total return, which frame how the market has recently treated the stock. headline: AdaptHealth Calls 2025 a Transition Year, Builds for 2026 Growth Ahead of Kaiser DME Deal
summary: AdaptHealth (NASDAQ:AHCO) is treating 2025 as a “transition and investment” year focused on operational streamlining and infrastructure buildout, while positioning 2026 as a year geared toward growth, Chief Financial Officer Jason Clemens said during a company discussion.
